overrideDescriptionKey.english: Draw a unit. If you have [effect0.secondarypower][coin], spend it to apply +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack], [avarice] [effect0.upgrade.status0.power], and [armor] [effect0.upgrade.status1.power].
overrideDescriptionKey.french: Piochez une unité. Si vous avez [effect0.secondarypower][coin], vous l'échangez contre +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack], [avarice] [effect0.upgrade.status0.power] et [armor] [effect0.upgrade.status1.power].
overrideDescriptionKey.german: Ziehe eine Einheit. Wenn du [effect0.secondarypower][coin] hast, gib sie aus, um +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack], [avarice] [effect0.upgrade.status0.power] und [armor] [effect0.upgrade.status1.power] anzuwenden.
overrideDescriptionKey.russian: Вытяните бойца. Если у вас есть [effect0.secondarypower][coin], потратьте их, чтобы наложить на него +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack], [avarice] х[effect0.upgrade.status0.power] и Броню х[effect0.upgrade.status1.power].
overrideDescriptionKey.portuguese: Compra uma unidade. Se você tem [effect0.secondarypower][coin], gaste para aplicar +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack], [avarice] [effect0.upgrade.status0.power] e [armor] [effect0.upgrade.status1.power].
overrideDescriptionKey.chinese: 抽取一张单位牌，如果你有 [effect0.secondarypower][coin]，则将其花费并获得+[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack]、[avarice] [effect0.upgrade.status0.power]和[armor] [effect0.upgrade.status1.power]。
overrideDescriptionKey.spanish: Roba una unidad. Si tienes [effect0.secondarypower][coin], las gastas para añadir +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack], [avarice] [effect0.upgrade.status0.power] y [armor] [effect0.upgrade.status1.power].
overrideDescriptionKey.chinese_traditional: 抽一張單位牌。如果你有[effect0.secondarypower][coin]，消耗它來施加+[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack]、[avarice][effect0.upgrade.status0.power]和[armor][effect0.upgrade.status1.power]。
overrideDescriptionKey.korean: 유닛 카드를 1장 뽑습니다. [effect0.secondarypower][coin]이 있다면, 이를 소비하며 +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack], [avarice] [effect0.upgrade.status0.power] 및 [armor] [effect0.upgrade.status1.power] 효과를 적용합니다.
overrideDescriptionKey.japanese: ユニットをドローする。[effect0.secondarypower][coin]がある場合、それを使い、+[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack]、[avarice] [effect0.upgrade.status0.power]、[armor] [effect0.upgrade.status1.power]を付与する。

cardLoreTooltipKeys.english: “A soldier who goes to war without the promise of pay is a fool with a sword.” —The Rules of Fhyra, Rule #22
cardLoreTooltipKeys.french: <nobr>« Un</nobr> soldat qui part à la guerre sans promesse de solde est un idiot armé d'une <nobr>épée. »</nobr> — Les règles de Fhyra, règle n°22
cardLoreTooltipKeys.german: „Ein Soldat, der ohne Aussicht auf Lohn in den Kampf zieht, ist ein Narr mit Schwert.“ —Fhyras Regeln, Regel 22
cardLoreTooltipKeys.russian: «Солдат, который идет на войну без оговоренного жалованья — дурак с мечом».— «Правила Фиры», правило 22
cardLoreTooltipKeys.portuguese: “Um soldado que vai para a guerra sem a promessa de um pagamento é apenas um tolo com uma espada.” — As Regras de Fhyra, Regra n.º 22
cardLoreTooltipKeys.chinese: “没有得到报酬的承诺就上战场的士兵都是拿着剑的傻瓜。”——《菲拉法则》，条例#22
cardLoreTooltipKeys.spanish: «Todo soldado que se embarque en la guerra sin la promesa de una paga es un necio con espada». —Normas de Fhyra, norma 22
cardLoreTooltipKeys.chinese_traditional: 「一個沒有先講好報酬就去打仗的士兵，只是個拿著劍的傻瓜。」——費拉法則，第22條
cardLoreTooltipKeys.korean: "비용을 받지 않고 전쟁에 나가는 병사는 검을 든 멍청이일 뿐이다." - 휘라 율법 22조
cardLoreTooltipKeys.japanese: 「支払いの約束なしに戦いにいく戦士は、剣を持った愚か者である」—ファイラの法、22条
